title: Beyond Transcription: Building Voice AI That Understands Conversations — Hervé Bredin, pyannoteAI
summary: Hervé Bredin argues that ASR leaderboards mask real-world performance gaps by using headset audio, while table microphones show 2.3x worse error rates on the same model and dataset. Current voice AI benchmarks focus on single-speaker scenarios that do not reflect conversational challenges like speaker overlap and diarization error in noisy environments reaching 41%.
